sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25700" key="diari/qmhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διᾰρίθμ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n25700.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">reckoning up,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χρημάτων</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.27c</biblScope> </bibl> </cit>; <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χρόνου</foreign> Theo Sm.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.148H.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
